calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Off Calendar

Req. For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the plaintiff National Cinemedia LLC. a limited liability company.
Order waiving live testimony at the hearing was in the case file.
Default of Defendant Shortkid Productions, Inc. a corp. has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendantas follows:

Damages/Principal - $36111.68
Prejudgment Interest $9652.21
Attorneys' fees - $5861.16
Costs - $625.00, for a Total of $52,250.05
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
